{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {"R1.4": "Mentions prior work on clarification-based retrieval and LLM-driven disambiguation but doesn't delve into specifics or compare against them.", "R1.7": "Lacks citations to relevant prior work in the field of radiology report retrieval or clarification-based retrieval.", "RX.1": "Presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty.", "RX.3": "The revised abstract stays within the scope of describing the RadResolve system and its improvements.", "RX.4": "No evidence of introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.", "RX.5": "Doesn't provide any information about the sources used for the revisions or the reasoning behind them."},
  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.95, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},

rationale.R1.4: Mentions prior work on clarification-based retrieval and LLM-driven disambiguation but doesn't delve into specifics or compare against them.
rationale.R1.7: Lacks citations to relevant prior work in the field of radiology report retrieval or clarification-based retrieval.
rationale.RX.1: Presents all claims as factual without acknowledging any uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The revised abstract stays within the scope of describing the RadResolve system and its improvements.
rationale.RX.4: No evidence of introducing new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide any information about the sources used for the revisions or the reasoning behind them.
